name: DolEx Dollar Express
description_short: DolEx Dollar Express at 1120 S Westmoreland Rd, Dallas, TX 75211 in the Oak Cliff neighborhood is open 9:00 AM – 8:00 PM daily. Call +1 800-481-1946.
description_long:
DolEx Dollar Express operates as a check-cashing and financial services provider located at 5405 E Grand Ave in Dallas, TX 75223. The company maintains a physical storefront serving the Dallas area with a dedicated phone line for customer inquiries.

Based on the available information, DolEx Dollar Express offers core check-cashing services along with ancillary financial products including money orders, wire transfers, and bill payment options. These services are typical of traditional check-cashing establishments that serve unbanked and underbanked consumers who need immediate access to funds without traditional banking relationships.

The company distinguishes itself through extended operating hours, remaining open until 8 PM on weekdays and maintaining weekend hours with a mid-day break on Sundays and Saturdays. This accessibility pattern suggests an intent to serve working-class customers who may have limited availability during standard business hours. The business maintains an active web presence with a dedicated website domain.

A significant limitation is that the available data comes exclusively from a Waze navigation page rather than the company's own website content or official marketing materials. This restricts the ability to provide detailed information about fee structures, specific service offerings, regulatory compliance, or company reputation. Consumers considering DolEx Dollar Express should contact them directly at (800) 481-1946 or visit their website at dolex.com for comprehensive service details and pricing information before using their services.
pros: Extended weekday hours until 8 PM accommodates working customers
Weekend availability on Saturday and Sunday with split hours
Physical location in accessible Dallas area (East Grand Ave)
Dedicated customer service phone line available
Multiple service offerings beyond basic check cashing (money orders, wire transfers, bill payment)
cons: Limited publicly available information about fee structures or pricing
No details on check verification methods or fraud protections
No information regarding regulatory licensing or compliance certifications
Mid-day closures on weekends reduce convenience despite extended hours
Single verified location limits geographic accessibility for broader customer base
best_for: Unbanked individuals needing immediate check cashing without bank accounts
Workers with non-traditional schedules requiring evening and weekend service access
Customers in the Dallas area needing multiple services (check cashing, money orders, wire transfers) at one location
diagnosis: DolEx Dollar Express is best suited for unbanked or underbanked Dallas residents who need check cashing and related financial services with flexible evening and weekend hours. The main caveat is that detailed information about fees, regulatory status, and specific service terms is not publicly available and should be confirmed directly with the company before use.
